_comment: Sample MCP config for the jMRI reference server. Add to ~/.claude.json under mcpServers.

jmri._comment: Exposes the 4 canonical jMRI tools: list_repos, search, retrieve, metadata

jcodemunch-mcp._comment: Full jMRI-Full implementation for code. 12 tools, 30+ languages.

jdocmunch-mcp._comment: Full jMRI-Full implementation for docs. MD, RST, HTML, notebooks, OpenAPI.
